label: Poor
description: Severe damage — card barely holds together but is identifiable.

label: Fair
description: Heavy creasing, staining, and discoloration throughout.

label: Very Good
description: Rounded corners, visible creases, possible tape marks.

label: VG-Excellent
description: Noticeable corner rounding, slight surface wrinkle.

label: Excellent
description: Above-average condition — corners show minor rounding.

label: Excellent-Near Mint
description: Light centering issues; minor corner wear visible under magnification.

label: Near Mint
description: Slight corner fraying; nearly pristine surface.

label: Near Mint-Mint
description: Minimal imperfections — sharp corners, clean surface.

label: Mint
description: Nearly perfect — one minor allowable defect.

label: Gem Mint
description: Virtually perfect — four sharp corners, full gloss, centered 55/45 or better.
